div.head: 319. Editorial Note
div.p: On November 16, representatives of the United States and Brazil signed a Surplus Agricultural Agreement under the provisions of Title I of Public Law 480. Under the terms of the agreement, the United States agreed to sell to Brazil surplus agricultural commodities valued at approximately $41 million. For text of the agreement, signed at Rio de Janeiro, see 6 UST 4033. Considerable additional documentation concerning the negotiation of this agreement is in Department of State, Central File 411.3241.
